description: Take running to the next level with these Equale shoes from adidas. These comfortable trainers are engineered with superior cushioning to give better shock absorption properties. Team them up with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperNubuck and suede leather upper with overlays for better durabilty and structurePerforations on the forefoot and mesh on the mouth for breathability and comfortLace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes symbolising the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sidesPadded and meshed collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfortBranding at the back of the collarPull loopUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleTextured outsole with horizontal lugsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
